privileged_info_summary: This task operates within the OpenCAD dispatch system (an open-source Computer Aided Dispatch system for roleplay communities). All metadata claims are verified: the task requires the agent to create a call with caller 'Foreman Mike' at location 'Quarry Main Gate' with description containing 'climbing' and 'fence', update the narrative with text containing '1A-01' and 'compliant', and close the call with status 'Closed'. All five metadata specifications are consistent with and directly supported by the task description.
